description_long: This is a large, multi-functional wooden desk and shelving unit, finished in a dark brown veneer. The structure features a spacious work surface with a curved front edge, integrated with multiple open shelves of varying sizes on the right side and above the desk. There is a cabinet with a door on the left side beneath the desk, and a pull-out keyboard tray is visible below the main work surface. The upper section includes two open cubby compartments and a wide shelf, ideal for books or decorative items. The overall design is modern and practical, suitable for use in offices, home studies, or public urban spaces such as libraries or community centers.
description: A large, dark wood desk and shelving unit with multiple open shelves, a cabinet, and a pull-out keyboard tray. Its modern design offers ample storage and workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main desk surface, open shelves, upper cubbies, and the cabinet door beneath the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the layered structure of the right side.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the arrangement of shelves, the curved desk surface, and the pull-out keyboard tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panel and the profile of the desk and shelving unit.
